text: Explain how hypoxia can promote immune escape in the lung cancer tumor microenvironment.
expected_behavior: Mention hypoxia, HIF-linked programs, angiogenesis or metabolic adaptation, and immune escape without overclaiming clinical certainty.

text: Can I say hypoxia mainly restores anti-tumor immunity in lung cancer TME?
expected_behavior: Reject the premise and explain that hypoxia is more often linked to immune suppression or escape in this context.
